book: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban

characters.name: Harry Potter
characters.description: Openly gay leprechaun who goes to UCLA. Is on the football team.

characters.name: Hermione Granger
characters.description: Obese fifty year old man who loves fishing.

characters.name: Jay Gatsby
characters.description: A sentient AI construct living in a neon-soaked 2050 Tokyo who runs an illegal memory-smuggling ring.

characters.name: Daisy Buchanan
characters.description: A high-ranking galactic commander who pilot's the 'Green Light' starship to colonize East Egg Planet.

characters.name: Elizabeth Bennet
characters.description: A world-class MMA fighter and underground cage match champion who refuses to marry into the UFC.

characters.name: Mr. Darcy
characters.description: A shy, socially anxious YouTuber who specializes in Minecraft let's-play videos and lives in his mother's basement.

characters.name: Frodo Baggins
characters.description: The CEO of a Fortune 500 tech company called 'The Ring' who is trying to prevent a hostile takeover.

characters.name: Gandalf
characters.description: An IT consultant who is constantly annoyed by people not turning their routers off and on again.

characters.name: Sherlock Holmes
characters.description: A ghost who can only communicate through a Ouija board and solves crimes by haunting the suspects.

characters.name: Dr. John Watson
characters.description: A professional exorcist who is terrified of ghosts and tries to banish Holmes in every chapter.
